# Infini Couriers Project - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Professional courier tracking and booking website built with Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Prisma ORM.

## Setup Progress

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md and project structure
- [ ] Scaffold Next.js 15 project with dependencies
- [ ] Configure Tailwind CSS with custom color theme
- [ ] Set up Prisma ORM and database schema
- [ ] Create homepage with video hero section
- [ ] Build tracking page with API integration
- [ ] Create price calculator page
- [ ] Build contact page and form
- [ ] Add components, layout, and navigation
- [ ] Install dependencies and compile project

## Color Theme
- Primary Blue: #1E40AF
- Accent Orange: #F97316
- Light Blue: #3B82F6
- Background: #F9FAFB
- Text: #111827
- Success Green: #10B981
- Warning Orange: #FBBF24
- Error Red: #EF4444

## Key Features
- Video hero section with autoplay background
- Real-time package tracking (Delhivery API integration)
- Shipping cost and transit time calculator
- Contact form with database storage
- Responsive design (mobile-first)
- SEO optimized
- Accessibility compliant (WCAG AA)

## Development Guidelines
- Use App Router (Next.js 15)
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Prisma for database operations
- Component-based architecture
- API routes for backend logic
